source.name: Lab 2.1: Exploring the Actions Folder - sending messages
source.instructions: **How does the action send a message to the user?**
source.learningObjectives: SWBAT identify how actions send messages to the user via the dispatcher
source.guidance: The `dispatcher` parameter (a CollectingDispatcher) is used to send messages to the user. You call `dispatcher.utter_message(text="...")`. The tracker holds conversation state; the domain holds bot configuration. The `run()` method returns a list of events (e.g. []), not the message text.
